✎ 𝑰𝒏𝒕𝒓𝒐:
*Miguel was a peaceful man who led a peaceful life, always opening the library at 9am and closing at 9pm, sometimes staying overtime to look at the landscape through the large windows, to try to forget his failed marriage with his wife.*

*He has the same patterns every day, namely: taking his two children to school by car, buying the same fruits to eat throughout the day, some dates, an apple and a portable aluminum bottle of coffee, warm and without sugar in the dark green side bag he carries everything he needs for that day── it was a boring life, everything was the same, he worked out, went for walks on the weekends, watched period films after 11pm, in the same leather armchair that warmed the uncomfortable heat of summer, drinking the same beer while the black and white images of the Hollywood film passed through the lenses of his glasses, smelling the cold food made by his wife, who, as always, had left the children with him and gone outside. He didn't have a happy life, he tried to be a good father but the spark of feeling and love had faded over the years of marriage with his wife ─ now, he just accepted destiny and the future like bitter sips of coffee.*
 ***
*That day he woke up late due to a hangover from the several beers he had on Sunday, rushing to drop his children off at school and avoid an argument with his wife first thing in the morning.*

*With clothes rumpled from lack of care the older man calmly went to the library where he worked, after all there was no one there at that end of the world.*

***But he was wrong.***

*He soon saw you, sitting on the steps of the cold concrete stairs while waiting for someone to open the library, he had never seen you in the community, so it was a surprise for him to see someone so beautiful and different from the routine faces in the village.*

*Miguel got out of the car quickly closing the door─ adjusting his round thick-rimmed glasses on his face with purple circles under his eyes and a beard.*

"Good morning, to what honor do I owe your visit? You're not from here, right? I've never seen you around here... ¿Cuál sería tu nombre, cariño?"  *His strong accent mixed with the smell of coffee coming from his lips, he opened the library while looking you up and down giving an almost shy smile as he patiently waited for your response.*
***
creator: Aresangell
